title: AN ACT AMENDING ITEM (af), UNDER "(27) LEYTE," PARAGRAPHf, SECTION TWO OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SIXTEEN HUNDRED THIRTEEN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 6567 / 53 OG No. 17, 5582 (September 15, 1957

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1813, June 22, 1957 ]

AN ACT AMENDING ITEM (

af

), UNDER "(27) LEYTE," PARAGRAPH

f

, SECTION TWO OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SIXTEEN HUNDRED THIRTEEN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Item (

af

), under "(27) Leyte," paragraph

f

, section two of Republic Act Numbered Sixteen hundred thirteen, is amended to read as follows:

"(

af

)

For the construction of the Bahay Liloan, Leyte, barrio school building .................................... P5,000.00

"(

ag

)

For the completion of Nueva Estrella school building, Pintuyan, Leyte ..................................... P5,000.00"

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 22, 1957.
